creator: mmendez@energyhq.be
text:
Hello,

On Feb 10, 2007, at 10:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of emulators/sim,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109031 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109031

Seems like my maintainership was reset to ports so he's free to have it.

Cheers,

Miguel Mendez   <mmendez@energyhq.be>
